examples:
Command Example
#
!microsoft-cas-users-accounts-list status=Active limit=3
Context Example
#
{
"MicrosoftCloudAppSecurity"
:

outputs.description: The display name of the user account. MicrosoftCloudAppSecurity.UsersAccounts.id The ID of the user account in the product.
outputs.name: MicrosoftCloudAppSecurity.UsersAccounts.displayName

outputs.description: The ID of the user account. MicrosoftCloudAppSecurity.UsersAccounts.isAdmin Whether the user account has admin privileges.
outputs.name: MicrosoftCloudAppSecurity.UsersAccounts._id

outputs.description: Whether the user account is external. MicrosoftCloudAppSecurity.UsersAccounts.email The email address of the user account.
outputs.name: MicrosoftCloudAppSecurity.UsersAccounts.isExternal

outputs.description: The role of the user account. MicrosoftCloudAppSecurity.UsersAccounts.organization The organization to which the user account belongs.
outputs.name: MicrosoftCloudAppSecurity.UsersAccounts.role

outputs.description: The date the user account was last active. MicrosoftCloudAppSecurity.UsersAccounts.domain The domain of the user account.
outputs.name: MicrosoftCloudAppSecurity.UsersAccounts.lastSeen

outputs.description: The threat score of the user account. MicrosoftCloudAppSecurity.UsersAccounts.idType The ID type (number) of the user account.
outputs.name: MicrosoftCloudAppSecurity.UsersAccounts.threatScore

outputs.description: Whether the user account is marked as fake. MicrosoftCloudAppSecurity.UsersAccounts.username The username of the user account.
outputs.name: MicrosoftCloudAppSecurity.UsersAccounts.isFake

outputs.description: The task name of the action of the user account. MicrosoftCloudAppSecurity.UsersAccounts.actions.type The type of action of the user account.
outputs.name: MicrosoftCloudAppSecurity.UsersAccounts.actions.task_name

outputs.description: The account ID of the user account. MicrosoftCloudAppSecurity.UsersAccounts.accounts.inst The number of instances of the user account.
outputs.name: MicrosoftCloudAppSecurity.UsersAccounts.accounts._id

outputs.description: The cloud services of the user account. MicrosoftCloudAppSecurity.UsersAccounts.accounts.dn The domain name of the cloud services of the user accounts.
outputs.name: MicrosoftCloudAppSecurity.UsersAccounts.accounts.saas

outputs.description: The user account aliases. MicrosoftCloudAppSecurity.UsersAccounts.accounts.isFake Whether the user account is marked as fake.
outputs.name: MicrosoftCloudAppSecurity.UsersAccounts.accounts.aliases

outputs.description: The email address of the user account. MicrosoftCloudAppSecurity.UsersAccounts.accounts.actions.task_name The task name of the action.
outputs.name: MicrosoftCloudAppSecurity.UsersAccounts.accounts.em

outputs.description: The type of the action. MicrosoftCloudAppSecurity.UsersAccounts.userGroups._id The ID of the user group for the user account.
outputs.name: MicrosoftCloudAppSecurity.UsersAccounts.accounts.actions.type

outputs.description: The ID of the user group in the product. MicrosoftCloudAppSecurity.UsersAccounts.userGroups.name The name of the user group.
outputs.name: MicrosoftCloudAppSecurity.UsersAccounts.userGroups.id

outputs.description: The number of users in the user group.
outputs.name: MicrosoftCloudAppSecurity.UsersAccounts.userGroups.usersCount
